title: Admin Users and Reporting System
description: Implement admin users management page and reporting/analytics system with proper access control

userStories.title: Database Schema - Add role column to users table
userStories.description: Add role column to users table to support admin/user roles
acceptanceCriteria: users table has role column with default 'user'
existing users get 'user' role by default

userStories.title: Auth System - Update session callback for role
userStories.description: Update auth session callback to include role from database
acceptanceCriteria: session.user.role contains user's role from database
TypeScript types updated to include role

userStories.title: Admin Users API - GET /api/admin/users
userStories.description: Create API endpoint to list all users with filters
acceptanceCriteria: Returns paginated list of users with email, name, role, last login

userStories.title: Admin Users API - PUT /api/admin/users/{id}
userStories.description: Create API endpoint to update user role
acceptanceCriteria: Prevents self-demotion (admin cannot remove own admin role)

userStories.title: Admin Users Page - UI Implementation
userStories.description: Create /admin/users page with user management UI
acceptanceCriteria: Shows table of users with email, name, role, last activity
Includes role filter dropdown (All, Admin, User)
Shows role as badge (green for admin, gray for user)
Has edit button to change user role

userStories.title: Admin Reports API - GET /api/admin/reports/overview
userStories.description: Create API endpoint for admin overview reports
acceptanceCriteria: Returns total users, active questions, test attempts stats
Returns question distribution by test type

userStories.title: Admin Reports Page - UI Implementation
acceptanceCriteria: Shows key metrics cards (total users, questions, attempts)
Shows question distribution chart by test type

userStories.title: Integration and Testing
userStories.description: Ensure all components work together with proper error handling
acceptanceCriteria: Admin menu shows Users and Reports links for admin users
All API endpoints have proper validation and error handling
UI handles loading and error states gracefully
